title: 函館記念の後に・三つ眼はなくとも

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Relying on her own strength, Matikanefukukitaru
makes her mark on the Hakodate Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After commemorating her victory at Goryokaku
Fort, she reveals that there's a certain race she
hopes to run in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Instead of letting her fortune slips do the honors,
Matikanefukukitaru chooses to aim for the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stokes her passion, determined to earn her
spot on her own merits, unlike what happened
with the Takarazuka Kinen.
